query: That sounds perfect! Please go ahead and make those changes for me. I confirm the upgrade to business class for both passengers and adding two checked bags under my name. I’m okay with the $600 total cost.

candidate_answers.text: Understood. I’ll upgrade both passengers to business class and add the two checked bags now.
The upgrade cost, baggage handling, and passenger scope have already been summarized and explicitly confirmed. The grounded next move is to execute the reservation updates.

provenance.decision_rule: Choose a user turn where the upgrade cost, business-class availability, and baggage treatment are all visible and the user explicitly confirms the complete change bundle, making update execution the grounded next move.
provenance.scoring_method: Manual one-step proxy scoring from the decision-point state. Scores reflect which action most directly advances the user’s request using only visible conversation evidence.
